title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
summary: Jack Roberts explains a seven-level progression model for building Hermes agents, from simple prompting to autonomous operating systems that manage multi-agent workflows. The tutorial covers integration of Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok through a unified agentic platform with skills, orchestration, and scheduled task execution.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a seven-level progression model for building Hermes agents, starting with simple prompting and ending with autonomous operating systems that manage multi-agent workflows. The tutorial shows how Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok integrate through a single agentic platform, with model routing directing requests across them. Key components include custom skills, orchestration, subagents, MCP, and scheduled task execution. The framing matters because it maps a staged path from basic prompts to coordinated, self-running agent systems.
